name: John D. Beckett
title: Chairman of R.W. Beckett Corporation
bio: American businessman and author who has led the R.W. Beckett Corporation, a leading manufacturer of heating components, since 1965.
faith: Author of 'Loving Monday: Succeeding in Business Without Selling Your Soul,' Beckett has been a prominent voice for faith in the workplace. He has spoken about applying Christian principles to business leadership for decades.

sources.title: Loving Monday: Succeeding in Business Without Selling Your Soul
sources.note: By John D. Beckett. His vision for integrating faith and work

tagline: Proved that loving God and loving business are not at odds
